name: smart-order-system
description: Microservices POC — clustering, worker threads, RabbitMQ

scripts.install:all: cd gateway && npm install && cd ../services/users && npm install && cd ../orders && npm install && cd ../notifications && npm install && cd ../../..
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n gateway,users,orders,notif -c cyan,blue,magenta,green "cd gateway && node index.js" "cd services/users && node index.js" "cd services/orders && node index.js" "cd services/notifications && node index.js"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n gateway,users,orders,notif -c cyan,blue,magenta,green "cd gateway && nodemon index.js" "cd services/users && nodemon index.js" "cd services/orders && nodemon index.js" "cd services/notifications && nodemon index.js"
